points.title: Gangaramaya Buddhist Temple
points.description: Magnificent temple complex with international artifacts, museum, and peaceful Beira Lake setting in the heart of the city.

points.title: Pettah Market District
points.description: Vibrant traditional trading center with specialized markets for spices, textiles, gems, and authentic local commerce.

points.title: Galle Face Green
points.description: Historic oceanfront promenade offering spectacular sunsets, street food culture, and recreational activities.

points.title: Colombo Fort District
points.description: Historic colonial administrative center featuring magnificent architecture, Clock Tower, and government buildings.

points.title: Red Mosque (Jami Ul-Alfar)
points.description: Iconic Indo-Saracenic mosque with distinctive red and white striped architecture and beautiful minarets.

points.title: Colombo National Museum
points.description: Comprehensive collection spanning 2,500 years of Sri Lankan history, art, and cultural artifacts.

points.title: Independence Memorial Hall
points.description: Beautiful Kandyan-style monument commemorating 1948 independence with cultural events and ceremonies.

points.title: Seema Malaka Temple
points.description: Peaceful Buddhist temple on Beira Lake island designed by Geoffrey Bawa with tranquil meditation spaces.

points.title: St. Lucia's Cathedral
points.description: Largest cathedral in Sri Lanka showcasing Gothic Revival architecture and significant Catholic heritage.

points.title: Viharamahadevi Park
points.description: Largest park in Colombo offering green spaces, children's playground, and venue for cultural events.

points.title: Old Parliament Building
points.description: Magnificent neoclassical colonial architecture serving as the former seat of Ceylon's legislature.

points.title: Wolvendaal Church
points.description: Historic Dutch Reformed church built in 1749, oldest Protestant church in Sri Lanka with colonial tombstones.

points.title: Sri Kailawasanathan Swami Devasthanam
points.description: Oldest Hindu temple in Colombo featuring intricate Dravidian architecture and serving Tamil community.

points.title: Colombo City Centre
points.description: Ultra-modern shopping and entertainment complex with international brands, dining, and leisure facilities.

points.title: Floating Market Pettah
points.description: Traditional floating market experience offering fresh produce, spices, and authentic local trading atmosphere.

points.title: Colombo Lighthouse
points.description: Historic lighthouse and modern shipping beacon overlooking Colombo Harbor and Indian Ocean.

points.title: Temple of Sri Subramaniar
points.description: Colorful Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Murugan featuring elaborate gopuram and religious festivals.

points.title: Dutch Period Museum
points.description: Beautifully preserved 17th-century Dutch mansion showcasing colonial life and trading relationships.

points.title: Khan Clock Tower
points.description: Historic timepiece built in 1875 serving as landmark in bustling Pettah district commercial area.

points.title: Beira Lake Recreation Area
points.description: Urban lake offering boat rides, birdwatching, and peaceful escape with temples on small islands.
